positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. Central composition with swirling nebulae, detailed star constellations, and exotic, stylized deep-sea organisms like glowing jellyfish and ethereal vines. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, sapphire blue, iridescent teal, and pops of bright cyan and magenta, creating a high-contrast, neo-psychedelic feel. Designed for a clean, wearable print on apparel, emphasizing sharp lines, bold silhouettes, and intricate symmetry. Minimal negative space around the core design, with perfect edges for cropping and printing. Vector art aesthetic, UHD quality, intricate detail, flat design principles, perfect circular composition.
